property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.11\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.11\bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\veena\Downloads\apache-maven-3.6.3-bin\apache-maven-3.6.3\bin;C:\apache-tomcat-9.0.43\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk1.8.0_281\bin;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Users\veena\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;.

testcase.name: testGetUsers
testcase.system-out:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Tue, 14 Jul 2026 13:43:49 GMT Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Etag: W/"5e6-bX+IgjHKZz+TflDmEXfyyaBO9Hk" Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=15552000; includeSubDomains Vary: Origin, Accept-Encoding X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-Dns-Prefetch-Control: off X-Download-Options: noopen X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN X-Ratelimit-Limit: 100 X-Ratelimit-Remaining: 99 X-Ratelimit-Reset: 1783410621 X-Xss-Protection: 1; mode=block Age: 21102 Cache-Control: no-store Cf-Cache-Status: HIT Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=J4xd8wUM%2FtZf21o0uv3rrxWMs9khzGuiOSKBTDQG7yTtSxMA%2FBldhiNjhmH16067foZW1yVnARJcXDhINFGjTiwFytQBxA181m5lHOkD%2BrZhHK0lK%2FJTyIZm7a4pYGOd"}]} Content-Encoding: gzip Server: cloudflare CF-RAY: a1b0f568ec342b44-MAA
{ "id": 1, "title": "Essence Mascara Lash Princess", "description": "The Essence Mascara Lash Princess is a popular mascara known for its volumizing and lengthening effects. Achieve dramatic lashes with this long-lasting and cruelty-free formula.", "category": "beauty", "price": 9.99, "discountPercentage": 10.48, "rating": 2.56, "stock": 99, "tags": [ "beauty", "mascara" ], "brand": "Essence", "sku": "BEA-ESS-ESS-001", "weight": 4, "dimensions": { "width": 15.14, "height": 13.08, "depth": 22.99 }, "warrantyInformation": "1 week warranty", "shippingInformation": "Ships in 3-5 business days", "availabilityStatus": "In Stock", "reviews": [ { "rating": 3, "comment": "Would not recommend!", "date": "2025-04-30T09:41:02.053Z", "reviewerName": "Eleanor Collins", "reviewerEmail": "eleanor.collins@x.dummyjson.com" }, { "rating": 4, "comment": "Very satisfied!", "date": "2025-04-30T09:41:02.053Z", "reviewerName": "Lucas Gordon", "reviewerEmail": "lucas.gordon@x.dummyjson.com" }, { "rating": 5, "comment": "Highly impressed!", "date": "2025-04-30T09:41:02.053Z", "reviewerName": "Eleanor Collins", "reviewerEmail": "eleanor.collins@x.dummyjson.com" } ], "returnPolicy": "No return policy", "minimumOrderQuantity": 48, "meta": { "createdAt": "2025-04-30T09:41:02.053Z", "updatedAt": "2025-04-30T09:41:02.053Z", "barcode": "5784719087687", "qrCode": "https://cdn.dummyjson.com/public/qr-code.png" }, "images": [ "https://cdn.dummyjson.com/product-images/beauty/essence-mascara-lash-princess/1.webp" ], "thumbnail": "https://cdn.dummyjson.com/product-images/beauty/essence-mascara-lash-princess/thumbnail.webp" }
